scenario: List with new array each render.
review_summary: slice().sort runs each render. Plus sorted array new ref - card props OK because key.

issues_found.title: Wasted computation
issues_found.explanation: Items unchanged still re-sorts.

review_summary: Cleanup checks ms but captures initial. Plus conditional cleanup wrong - always cleanup.

issues_found.title: Conditional cleanup wrong
issues_found.explanation: Cleanup always runs on unmount. Should ALWAYS clearInterval.

issues_found.title: Stale closure
issues_found.explanation: ms captured at effect time = initialMs forever.
issues_found.fix: Use latest via ref or always clear

what_makes_this_review_senior: Cleanup is unconditional; stale closure avoidance.

review_summary: All-or-nothing. One service down kills entire dashboard.

issues_found.title: All or nothing
issues_found.explanation: Revenue endpoint down = whole dashboard fails.

review_summary: Overload return types differ but implementation returns unknown. Plus shadows global fetch.

issues_found.title: Naming collision
issues_found.explanation: Native fetch hidden.

issues_found.title: Inconsistent
issues_found.explanation: One returns unknown, another Response. Confusing.

broader_pattern: Don't shadow globals; consistent overload returns.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Don't shadow globals; consistent overload semantics.

review_summary: Empty alt OK only if button has accessible name. Here button has none.

issues_found.title: No accessible name
issues_found.explanation: Icon's empty alt means decorative. Button has nothing to read.

issues_that_arent_issues: alt='' for decorative is correct convention.
broader_pattern: Empty alt OK only when context provides accessible name.
what_makes_this_review_senior: alt='' + aria-label pairing for icon buttons.

review_summary: Two calls in same tick: both see initial count. Only +2 applied.

issues_found.title: Stale state
issues_found.explanation: Both calls read initial count. Functional update needed.

code_under_review:
<form onSubmit={onSubmit}>
  <input {...register('name')} />
  <button onClick={reset}>Reset</button>
  <button>Submit</button>
</form>
review_summary: Reset button without type='button' defaults to submit. Clicking Reset submits form.

issues_found.title: Defaults to submit
issues_found.explanation: Buttons in form default to type=submit. Click Reset = submit form.

broader_pattern: Buttons in forms need explicit type unless submitting.
fixed_code:
<form onSubmit={onSubmit}>
  <input {...register('name')} />
  <button type="button" onClick={reset}>Reset</button>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>

// review-232: regression guard for Submit button without type.
// Keep the corrected boundary covered by a focused unit test and a review note explaining why the original shortcut was unsafe.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Button type defaults; explicit type in forms.

review_summary: width animation triggers layout. Use transform: scaleX with transform-origin.

issues_found.title: Layout-triggering
issues_found.explanation: width changes cause layout reflow.

review_summary: fp-ts is 100KB+. For one pipe function = absurd. Plus pipe is trivial to write.

issues_found.title: 100KB for pipe
issues_found.explanation: fp-ts entire lib for one helper.

broader_pattern: Don't import libraries for trivial helpers.

review_summary: Console only. Production errors lost.

issues_found.title: No telemetry
issues_found.explanation: Production users' errors lost.

review_summary: Cleanup outside cleanup function. Plus no setTimeout cancellation.

issues_found.title: Wrong cleanup mechanism
issues_found.explanation: useEffect returns cleanup. setTimeout doesn't fire on unmount.

broader_pattern: useEffect cleanup is the return value.

review_summary: React favors composition. Class inheritance is anti-pattern.

issues_found.title: Inheritance
issues_found.explanation: React community: composition > inheritance.

review_summary: Server errors can contain attacker input. XSS via error message.

issues_found.title: Server error = XSS
issues_found.explanation: If server echoes user input in error, attacker can XSS.

broader_pattern: Never trust strings to be HTML-safe.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Don't dangerously set HTML from server strings.

review_summary: Locale-dependent format = SSR locale != client locale.

issues_found.title: Locale mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server's locale != user's.

broader_pattern: Explicit locale or post-mount for locale-dependent.

review_summary: Drops ALL console including error/warn used for crucial debugging.

issues_found.title: Drops error too
issues_found.explanation: console.error/warn often used for important warnings.

review_summary: Child redefined each render. React treats as new component = full remount.

issues_found.title: Recreated each render
issues_found.explanation: New Function each render = React sees new type = unmount + remount.

issues_that_arent_issues: Closure intent OK but wrong implementation.

review_summary: Cleanup only returned when enabled. Behavior is correct - if disabled, no cleanup needed.

issues_found.title: Style
issues_found.explanation: Pattern is correct but could be early-return for clarity.
issues_found.verification: Verify Cleanup not run. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

review_summary: On failure, retries at same interval. Server down = hammered.

issues_found.title: No backoff
issues_found.explanation: Server failing = client keeps hammering.

issues_found.title: Silent failures
issues_found.explanation: No telemetry.

broader_pattern: React Query handles polling with backoff.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Backoff on failure; React Query handles.

review_summary: Subtracts strings = NaN. No type check on field being numeric.

issues_found.title: NaN for strings
issues_found.explanation: String - string = NaN.

review_summary: SR doesn't know app is loading. Spinner is visual only.

issues_found.title: SR unaware
issues_found.explanation: Loading change not announced.

broader_pattern: aria-busy or live region for loading states.

review_summary: Two sources of truth = sync nightmare.

issues_found.title: Multiple sources
issues_found.explanation: Context and Zustand both store user. Manual sync = bugs.

issues_that_arent_issues: Both libs valid - pick one for this state.
broader_pattern: One source of truth per piece of state.

review_summary: Default values evaluated once. URL change after mount doesn't update.

issues_found.title: Not reactive
issues_found.explanation: defaultValues only on first render. URL changes don't update form.

what_makes_this_review_senior: defaultValues only initial; reset for sync.

review_summary: setState on mousemove = React render per move. ~60Hz.

issues_found.title: 60Hz React renders
issues_found.explanation: Each mouse move = full React render cycle.

broader_pattern: High-frequency input = motion values, not state.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Motion values bypass React for high-freq.

code_under_review:
import 'whatwg-fetch';

fetch('/api/data');
review_summary: whatwg-fetch polyfill for browsers that natively support fetch (since 2017).

issues_found.title: Unneeded polyfill
issues_found.explanation: All modern browsers support fetch. Polyfill ~30KB waste.

review_summary: Snapshot includes today's date. Tomorrow, test fails.

issues_found.title: Time-sensitive snapshot
issues_found.explanation: Date in component output. Snapshot frozen at write time. Future runs fail.
issues_found.fix: Pass date as prop or mock

what_makes_this_review_senior: Mock time in tests; deterministic tests.
